solutions.title: Our solutions
solutions.intro: We provide inland container transport across Saudi Arabia with dedicated teams and continuous service—fast, reliable solutions tailored to your needs.

shipping.metaDescription: Container shipping solutions in Saudi Arabia and the Gulf—coordination between seaports and inland destinations, road legs, and vetted carriers on the hawai Logisti network.
shipping.body:
Our shipping solutions are built around full container loads moving between seaports, inland cities, and major logistics hubs. We focus on dependable handoffs, realistic schedules, and carriers who understand container equipment and terminal requirements.

Every lane is different: some customers need fixed weekly rotations, others need project-based capacity for surges or new routes. We work with you to match equipment types (20 ft / 40 ft and common specials), document cut-offs where they apply, and the right road capacity so the inland leg does not become the bottleneck.

Through hawai Logisti you gain a single coordination layer between your commercial team and approved transport partners. That reduces duplicated calls, clarifies who owns each milestone, and makes it easier to respond when vessels slip or pickup windows move.

We also support visibility: you should know when a container is booked for haulage, when it is in transit, and when proof of delivery expectations apply—without chasing multiple spreadsheets.

If you operate across Saudi Arabia or connect into Gulf corridors, talk to us about origin–destination pairs, seasonality, and service levels. We will help you structure a shipping plan that fits your volumes and your customers’ deadlines.

inland.metaDescription: Inland container transport and logistics in Saudi Arabia—route planning, carrier matching, and continuous service across Saudi cities.
inland.body:
Inland transport is the backbone of hawai Logisti. We connect companies that need to move containers by road with professional carriers that run regularly between major cities and industrial zones across the Kingdom.

Our logistics team plans around distance, permitted routes, equipment compatibility, and realistic transit times—not optimistic averages. We match your shipment profile to carriers who have the right fleet and experience, then stay engaged through pickup, transit, and handover.

Predictability matters. Retail, manufacturing, and project cargo all suffer when the last inland mile is uncertain. We emphasise clear communication when traffic, weather, or terminal delays affect the plan, so you can adjust downstream activities instead of discovering problems too late.

For recurring programs we help stabilise capacity: agreed lanes, standard operating procedures, and escalation paths when exceptions occur. For ad hoc moves we focus on fast qualification and dispatch without skipping safety or compliance basics.

Whether you are expanding to new regions or tightening an existing network, we can review your inland container flows and suggest practical improvements—coverage, frequency, and cost-to-service balance.

digital.metaDescription: Digital tools for shippers and carriers—online shipment requests, tracking, dashboards, and structured workflows on hawai Logisti.
digital.body:
Digital business solutions mean fewer manual steps and fewer misunderstandings. hawai Logisti gives shipping companies and carriers shared tools to create requests, assign work, and follow status in one ecosystem instead of scattered messages.

Companies can submit structured shipment requests with routes, cargo details, and timing. Carriers receive clear tasks aligned with their role and can accept or decline according to capacity. Administrators retain oversight where your organisation requires it—approvals, pricing steps, and audit-friendly history.

Tracking and notifications reduce “where is my container?” loops. Key events surface in the product where possible, so operations and customer service teams work from the same picture.

We design workflows to reduce re-keying: validated fields, consistent units, and handoffs that do not depend on a single person’s inbox. That lowers error rates and speeds up onboarding for new staff.

Sign in to access role-specific dashboards, or use public entry points on the homepage where we expose tracking and lightweight flows for partners who do not need a full account yet. If you need deeper integration in the future, we can discuss how your systems and ours align.

cargo.metaDescription: Cargo coverage and network solutions—vetted partners, broader reach, and responsive support for container moves across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf.
cargo.body:
Cargo cover solutions are about resilience: knowing you have access to capacity and expertise when lanes get tight, when a new customer opens a lane you have never run, or when you need backup partners who meet your standards.

hawai Logisti grows a curated network of carriers and service patterns so you are not starting from zero on every tender. We think in corridors and hubs—where trucks actually run, where equipment turns, and where delays tend to cluster—so recommendations are grounded in operations, not only maps.

We emphasise clear ownership: who books the move, who confirms pickup, who monitors transit, and how exceptions are escalated. That clarity matters for insurance-related processes, customer SLAs, and internal governance.

Coverage is not only geography; it is also capability—container types, weight bands, and familiarity with ports and handling facilities. We work with you to document what “good” looks like for your cargo profile, then align partners accordingly.

As your business grows into new cities or cross-border flows within the Gulf, we can help you stress-test your network design and prioritise where to add partners first. Contact us with your strategic lanes and risk sensitivities—we will outline practical options.

stats.headline: Connecting shipping companies with carriers across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf
stats.body: We built our platform to connect companies (shipping between ports, cities, and the Gulf) with approved carriers. Reliable service you can count on for moving containers by road between cities across the Kingdom.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn what hawai Logisti does: connecting shipping companies with approved carriers for inland container transport across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf.
aboutPage.title: About hawai Logisti
aboutPage.body:
hawai Logisti is a digital platform built for the real-world work of moving containers by road. We focus on the space between ports, cities, and industrial zones—where shipping companies need reliable capacity and professional carriers need fairly presented, structured requests.

Our mission is simple: make it easier to find the right partner for each lane, keep expectations aligned on timing and handoffs, and reduce friction caused by scattered messages and unclear ownership. Whether you move a few containers a month or run a high-volume program, the same principles apply—clarity, accountability, and service you can plan around.

For companies that ship cargo, we offer tools to submit and track shipment requests, see status in one place, and coordinate with administrators when pricing or approvals are part of your process. For carriers, we provide a clear view of opportunities you can accept or decline according to your fleet and coverage—without giving up operational control.

We operate with Saudi Arabia and Gulf connectivity in mind. Many of our customers think in corridors and recurring lanes, not single postcode pairs. Our content and workflows reflect inland container logistics: equipment types, realistic transit assumptions, and the handoffs that matter on the ground.

hawai Logisti is not a substitute for your own contracts, insurance, or compliance obligations—but we aim to be the layer where day-to-day coordination becomes faster and more transparent. If you are exploring the platform for the first time, use the contact options on the homepage or sign in to see the experience tailored to your role.

Thank you for your interest—we look forward to supporting your inland container operations.

carousel.slide1Title: Benefit from our wide inland coverage across Saudi cities
carousel.slide1Desc: Efficient inland container services across our network—broad city and road coverage, tailored solutions, and dependable transit times.
carousel.slide2Desc: Move your containers by road across Saudi cities. Dedicated teams, continuous service, and solutions built for your needs.

admin.shipmentRequestsSubtitle: Review all requests, search, filter by status, then open details.

admin.newsEmpty: No news yet. Add items using the button above.
admin.advisoriesEmpty: No advisories yet. Add items using the button above.
admin.contactIntro: This appears in the “Contact us” area of the hero on the home page (email button and news link).
admin.newsTableSearchPlaceholder: Search by title, category, or date…
admin.tableDeleteConfirmNews: Delete this news item? This cannot be undone.
admin.tableDeleteConfirmAdvisory: Delete this advisory? This cannot be undone.
admin.tableDeleteError: Could not delete. Please try again.
admin.pricingIntro: Set the per-kilometer rate and multiplier used to estimate prices for new shipment requests (distance × rate × multiplier). Optional notes appear next to the estimate on the homepage.
admin.pricingSarPerKmHint: Example: 500 means 500 SAR for each km before the multiplier.
admin.pricingMultiplierHint: Applied after distance × rate (e.g. 1.15 for fees or margin). Must be greater than zero.
admin.pricingDetailsPlaceholder: Short note shown to customers under the estimated price on the home page…
admin.pricingDetailsHint: Use for VAT, surcharges, or how the estimate is calculated. Shown as-is (you can write in Arabic or English).
admin.shipmentProgressRejectedHint: This request was rejected by admin after the carrier’s decision.
admin.shipmentDetailAdminActionsSubtitle: Approve final price or reject after the carrier’s decision
admin.shipmentActionsSearchPlaceholder: Search by company name, contact, phone, email...
admin.shipmentActionsNoSearchResults: No compatible companies match your search.
admin.shipmentActionsNoCompatible: No compatible shipment companies found for this request yet.
admin.shipmentActionsPendingCarrier: Waiting for the carrier’s decision first.
admin.shipmentActionsPriceChangeNoticeLabel: Notice to the company (shown when they track the request)
admin.shipmentActionsPriceChangeNoticePlacehol: Briefly explain why the final price differs from the estimate…
admin.shipmentActionsPriceChangeNoticeRequired: Enter a notice for the company when the final price differs from the estimate.
admin.shipmentActionsErrorPriceRequired: Enter a valid price before approval.
admin.shipmentActionsInvoiceHint: The company will see this link when they track the request on the homepage (after final price approval).
admin.shipmentActionsPaymentProofWaiting: Payment receipt uploaded — waiting for your approval.

guestAccount.title: Send your shipment request
guestAccount.body: Verify your email first, then create your company account. We’ll submit the request right after.
guestAccount.bodyEmailStep: Enter your email and we’ll send a 6-digit code. No account is created until you verify.
guestAccount.bodyCodeStep: Enter the code we sent to your inbox.
guestAccount.bodyDetailsStep: Your email is verified. Add a password and company details to finish.

emailVerify.title: Verify your email

emailVerify.invalidOrExpired: Invalid or expired code. Try again or request a new code.
emailVerify.emailNotSent: We could not send the verification email. Check server email settings or try again later.
